tokens.v: Claire says a good diet matters most, Paul says regular checkups matter most. Both are useful,
I believe the one habit that matters most is sleeping well every night. Sleep is not just one healthy habit

many. It is the base layer that lets the other habits actually do their job.
Think about Claire's point first. A balanced diet gives the body its raw materials.
we do not sleep enough, the hunger hormones go out of balance
the body does not process food well. Even healthy food cannot help much on top of bad sleep. Paul's idea has the same problem. A checkup can find something early,
many modern diseases grow out of years of poor sleep. A yearly visit can catch them

cannot undo them.
Sleep,
keeps the body running.
deep sleep, the brain clears out waste, the immune system rebuilds,
muscles repair.

rounds.name: Round 4 · 句法骨架
rounds.description: 整块从句 / 介词短语 / 修饰结构

tokens.v: Claire says a good diet matters most, Paul says regular checkups matter most. Both are useful, but

tokens.answer: I believe the one habit that matters most is sleeping well every night.

tokens.v: Sleep is not just one healthy habit among many. It is the base layer

tokens.answer: that lets the other habits actually do their job.

tokens.v: A balanced diet gives the body its raw materials.

tokens.answer: But when we do not sleep enough,

tokens.v: the hunger hormones go out of balance and the body does not process food well. A checkup can find something early,

tokens.answer: but many modern diseases — high blood pressure, type-2 diabetes, memory loss — grow out of years of poor sleep.

tokens.v:
A yearly visit can catch them but cannot undo them.
Sleep, by contrast, keeps the body running.
the brain clears out waste, the immune system rebuilds, and muscles repair. The Whitehall study in the UK found that

tokens.answer: adults who sleep less than six hours a night have nearly 50% higher heart-disease risk.

tokens.v: Diet and checkups are useful fixes; sleep is

tokens.answer: the quiet work that keeps everything else working.
